title: PlanReviewVerifyInputsInput
description: INPUT of `plan_review_verify_inputs`: the ticket whose plan text is assembled plus the Pass-1 finder findings the verifier INSTRUCTIONS are listed from.

ticket_id.description: The ticket under review (its plan_text becomes {{plan}}).

findings.description: The Pass-1 finder findings (each with finding/criteria/evidence/impact) listed into the verifier instructions.
